form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; 10th (Fr7) over 1650m after racing wide at Bendigo was 2nd-0.8 at the bell, beaten 17 m by Sonnyboy (2:04.20) in NR 37 to 41 on April 8 at $34. Showed ability the run before when she won by a head after showing early speed, (Fr2) at Maryborough (2:07.00) beating Azalea Mae in NR up to 36 on March 30 at $4.20 at the bell was leading 4.8. Perfectly drawn on the pegs and is expected to run well.
